name: Black Worker Ant

attacks.name: Nibble
attacks.tell: It bites with its jaws quickly
attacks.howToAvoid: Block or move away to reduce damage

attacks.name: Loaded Bite
attacks.tell: Pauses for a moment before launching a powerful bite
attacks.howToAvoid: Easier to dodge due to its preparation
attacks.notes: Stronger attack (~46 damage) than normal bite

description: A tougher ant that commonly appears around the Black Anthill and several late-yard regions.
behavior: It patrols and works in groups near the anthill, defending resources and internal routes.
interactionWithPlayer: It stays neutral until attacked or when you push too far into its territory.
interactionWithCreatures: It coordinates with other black ants and joins fights quickly when one is threatened.
strategy: Spicy and stabbing weapons punish it best. Keep your guard up for its bites and avoid getting surrounded.

abilities.name: Nibble
abilities.description: A quick baseline bite with its jaws.

abilities.name: Loaded Bite
abilities.description: It pauses briefly before delivering a stronger bite.
